prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength through weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with at least 4 meals/snacks
Includes high-protein vegetarian options (legumes, dairy, eggs, tofu, nuts) meeting ~1.6-2.2g protein per lb bodyweight
At least one meal timed within 2 hours before or after workout
Compact format with clear meal timing and macronutrient focus
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-training athlete (weightlifter) with dietary restrictions (vegetarian) requiring high protein alternatives and meal timing around workout windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and strategic hydration for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals and snacks for one full day with appropriate timing around training
Carbohydrate-focused nutrition with high total daily carbs suitable for marathon training
Includes specific hydration recommendations with timing throughout the day
Respects vegetarian diet and nut-free restrictions in all meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific hydration timing throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Recovery nutrition for swimmer returning from shoulder injury while maintaining aerobic capacity
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No processed foods, gluten-free, allergic to shellfish

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and 1-2 snacks
Includes anti-inflammatory foods (fatty fish, berries, leafy greens, turmeric) appropriate for injury recovery
Provides adequate protein (0.7-1g per lb body weight) to support muscle recovery
Portions are modified to accommodate post-injury reduced training load while maintaining athlete nutrition standards
All foods comply with stated restrictions (no processed foods, gluten-free, no shellfish)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (swimmer) recovering from injury, requiring anti-inflammatory foods and modified portions while maintaining performance nutrition standards
